citation.description: Story a3d7-fadb-e7e9-4e2c (cultivated-aquatic-crow, 'audit web server scaffolding') status=closed with completion-verifier PASS attestation signed at 1784096268. Story ff6f-b655-4058-4308 (depressant-amethyst-wasp, 'audit per-ticket page') status=closed with completion-verifier PASS attestation signed at 1784099419. Both have parent_id=2141-0ba0-5313-48d4.

criteria.criterion: The page is navigable across the retained review history for BOTH plan review AND code review: an OLDER round (not just the latest) of EACH can be selected and its distinct content renders.

With the feature enabled, `rebar audit serve` serves a ticket audit page showing the ticket details and the plan/completion/code panels with pass-1..4 detail, per-finding resolved thresholds, and the completion criteria[] rows.
With the feature disabled (default), no web dependency is imported and all existing commands behave unchanged.
